events.title: April Happy Hour (ABA)
events.description: Our April Happy Hour on April 8th from 4:30-6:30pm, will be hosted at Gravel Bottom Craft Brewery. Enjoy a relaxed evening of networking, conversation, and community connection in one of Ada’s favorite gathering spots. Whether you’re reconnecting with fellow members or meeting new faces, this casual after-hours event is a great way to stay engaged with the ABA community. We look forward to seeing you on April 8th at Gravel Bottom Craft Brewery.

events.description: The Clean Fuels Michigan Mobility Insiders Networking Dinner provides a unique opportunity to meet with state leaders in small groups over dinner, drinks, and dessert to discuss clean mobility priorities and initiatives.

events.title: Innovate State: The Pursuit of Hidden Opportunity
events.description: The Innovate State Speaker Series brings emerging and accomplished Spartan entrepreneurs—innovators, builders, creators, and visionaries—to campus for a live, unscripted fireside chat. These 60-minute sessions offer the chance for guests to share their perspectives on a wide array of topics like innovation, startup life, investments, and career paths. HOSTED BY: MSU Burgess Institute for Entrepreneurship & Innovation

events.title: Lunch & Learn: Pitch to Win.
events.description: Winning a pitch competition is a great way to fund a business need, BUT only the best ‘pitchers’ win. Join us on April 17 to learn from multiple pitch-winner Maneeka Brown. We can’t guarantee your future results, but […]

events.title: Distilling Innovation
events.description: Join us during Northern Michigan Startup Week at Mammoth Distilling for a panel and candid conversation about what it takes to turn ideas into companies. Founders, investors, and researchers will share their experiences building ventures rooted in Michigan innovation—from space technology to sustainable craft beverage systems and heritage agriculture.

events.title: Midwest Marketing Meetup
events.description: Whether you're seasoned or new to the industry, connect with West Michigan's marketing community and hear real insights from someone in the trenches.

events.title: Workshop: Build an app in two hours
events.description: In this hands-on workshop, Jon VerLee will guide early-stage founders and aspiring entrepreneurs through the process of turning an app idea into a functional MVP. Using modern tools and practical frameworks, you’ll learn how to move from concept to creation quickly - no technical experience necessary. By the end, you’ll walk away with a working MVP you can begin testing, validating, and refining with real users.

events.title: OutPro Forum: The Business of Belonging
speaker series: Sheena Brown
events.description: Sheena Brown is the founder of Fatirah’s Designs and a creative visionary with over 20 years of experience designing and producing transformational events. A former special education educator turned entrepreneur, Sheena blends artistic excellence with deep care for client experience. Recognized in national and local publications, she will share her journey of building a creative business rooted in vision, purpose, and excellence.

events.title: Lunch & Learn: How to get a loan with a CDFI
events.description: GROW is a CDFI that helps small business owners get loans from $1-50K. They have a friendly and supportive process to help you prepare and apply for a loan. Come learn and ask all of your questions at this Lunch & Learn.

events.title: Cómo obtener un préstamo con una CDFI
events.description: GROW es una CDFI que ayuda a propietarios de pequeños negocios a obtener préstamos de $1,000 a $50,000. Su proceso es amable y acompañan a los emprendedores para prepararse y solicitar un préstamo con confianza. Acompáñanos para aprender más y hacer todas tus preguntas en este Lunch & Learn
